title: Return Policy
content: SwiftShip Logistics offers a comprehensive 30-day return policy for all items purchased through our platform. Customers may initiate a return within 30 calendar days from the date of delivery. To be eligible for a return, items must be in their original condition, unused, and in the original packaging with all tags attached. Perishable goods, personalized items, and digital downloads are excluded from our return policy. To start a return, customers should log into their account and navigate to the order history section, select the item they wish to return, and choose the reason for the return. A prepaid return shipping label will be generated automatically for domestic orders. International returns require the customer to cover return shipping costs. Once the returned item is received at our warehouse, our team will inspect it within 2 business days. If approved, the refund will be processed to the original payment method. Customers will receive an email confirmation when the return is received and when the refund is processed. For items that arrive damaged or defective, please refer to our Damage Claims policy for expedited processing.

title: Shipping Policy
content: SwiftShip Logistics provides multiple shipping options to meet customer needs. Standard Shipping takes 5 to 7 business days and is available for a flat rate of $5.99, or free on orders over $50. Express Shipping delivers within 2 to 3 business days for $12.99. Same-Day Delivery is available in select metropolitan areas for orders placed before 12 PM local time at a cost of $19.99. All shipping times are calculated from the date of shipment, not the date the order is placed. Processing typically takes 1 to 2 business days before the item ships. Customers receive tracking information via email once their order has shipped. We ship to all 50 US states, US territories, and select international destinations. Large or oversized items may incur additional shipping charges, which will be displayed at checkout. During peak seasons such as holidays, shipping times may be extended by 1 to 3 additional business days. We partner with UPS, FedEx, USPS, and DHL to ensure reliable delivery. Signature confirmation is required for orders over $200 in value. Customers can update their shipping address before the order enters the shipped status by contacting customer support.

title: Damage Claims Policy
content: If a customer receives a damaged or defective item, SwiftShip Logistics will resolve the issue promptly. Customers must report damage within 7 calendar days of receiving their order. To file a damage claim, customers should contact our support team or use the online claims form in their account dashboard. Required documentation includes clear photographs of the damaged item from multiple angles, a photo of the packaging showing any visible damage, the order number, and a brief description of the damage. Our claims team reviews submissions within 24 to 48 hours. Upon approval, customers can choose between a full replacement shipped at no additional cost with express shipping, or a complete refund to the original payment method. For high-value items over $100, we may arrange a carrier pickup of the damaged item. Customers do not need to return damaged items valued under $50. If the damage was caused during shipping, SwiftShip will file a claim with the carrier on behalf of the customer. We maintain a damage resolution rate of under 48 hours for most claims. Repeat damage claims on the same order type may trigger a packaging review to prevent future incidents.

title: Cancellation Policy
content: Customers may cancel their order at any time before it enters the shipped status. To cancel an order, customers can use the cancel button on their order details page or contact our customer support team. Orders in the processing status can be cancelled immediately with a full refund. Orders that have already been shipped cannot be cancelled through the standard process. Instead, customers should wait to receive the item and then initiate a return under our Return Policy. For subscription orders, cancellation must be requested at least 48 hours before the next billing cycle to avoid being charged for the upcoming period. Bulk or custom orders may be subject to a 10 percent restocking fee if cancelled after production has begun. Same-day delivery orders can only be cancelled within 30 minutes of placement due to the expedited nature of processing. Refunds for cancelled orders are processed within 1 to 2 business days. Customers receive an email confirmation upon successful cancellation. If a cancelled order has already been charged, the refund will appear on the customer's statement within 3 to 5 business days depending on their financial institution. Gift card purchases used on cancelled orders will be re-credited to the original gift card.

title: Refund Policy
content: SwiftShip Logistics processes refunds promptly once a return or cancellation is approved. Refunds to credit cards typically appear within 3 to 5 business days after processing. Debit card refunds may take 5 to 10 business days depending on the issuing bank. PayPal refunds are processed within 1 to 2 business days. Bank transfer refunds may require up to 10 business days to appear in the customer's account. Gift card refunds are credited back to the original gift card immediately upon approval. Partial refunds may be issued for items returned in used or opened condition at our discretion, typically at 80 percent of the original purchase price. Shipping charges are refunded only if the return is due to a SwiftShip error, such as a wrong item shipped or a defective product. Refunds are always issued to the original payment method used at checkout. Customers can track refund status in their account under order history. If a refund has not appeared within the expected timeframe, customers should first check with their bank or payment provider, then contact our support team with the order number and refund confirmation email for further investigation.

title: Lost Package Policy
content: If a customer believes their package has been lost in transit, SwiftShip Logistics will investigate and resolve the issue. Customers should report a suspected lost package if it has not arrived within 7 calendar days after the estimated delivery date. To report a lost package, customers can use the report issue button on their order tracking page or contact our customer support team with their order number and tracking information. Upon receiving a lost package report, our team initiates an investigation with the shipping carrier, which typically takes 3 to 5 business days. During the investigation, the carrier will attempt to locate the package and verify delivery scans and GPS data. If the package is confirmed as lost, the customer will be offered a choice between a full replacement shipped with express delivery at no additional charge, or a complete refund to the original payment method. Packages marked as delivered but not received may require additional investigation, including verification of the delivery address and checking with neighbors. If a package is found after a replacement has been sent, the customer is not required to return either package for items valued under $75. For high-value items, SwiftShip may require the return of the original package if located. Customers with repeated lost package claims at the same address may be required to use signature confirmation for future orders.

title: International Shipping Policy
content: SwiftShip Logistics ships to over 40 countries worldwide including Canada, United Kingdom, Germany, France, Australia, Japan, and South Korea. International Standard Shipping takes 10 to 15 business days and costs vary by destination starting at $14.99. International Express Shipping delivers within 5 to 7 business days starting at $29.99. All international orders are subject to customs duties, import taxes, and brokerage fees which are the responsibility of the recipient. These charges are determined by the destination country's customs authority and are not included in SwiftShip's shipping charges. We provide customs documentation and accurate declarations for all international shipments. Certain items may be restricted or prohibited for international shipping based on the destination country's import regulations, including electronics with lithium batteries, food items, and specific chemicals. International customers can track their orders using the provided tracking number on both our website and the carrier's international tracking portal. Returns for international orders must be shipped back at the customer's expense unless the item was damaged, defective, or incorrect. International refunds are processed in the original currency of the transaction. Delivery times may be extended during customs processing periods or local holidays in the destination country.

title: Warranty Policy
content: All products sold through SwiftShip Logistics come with a standard 1-year manufacturer's warranty unless otherwise noted on the product page. The warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship under normal use conditions. It does not cover damage caused by accidents, misuse, unauthorized modifications, or normal wear and tear. To make a warranty claim, customers should contact our support team with their order number, a description of the issue, and photographs if applicable. Our team will coordinate with the manufacturer to determine if the issue falls under warranty coverage. Approved warranty claims result in either a repair, replacement, or refund at the manufacturer's discretion. Extended warranty plans are available for purchase on eligible products at checkout, providing coverage for an additional 1 to 2 years beyond the standard warranty period. Extended warranties also cover accidental damage from drops and spills for portable electronics. Warranty claims are typically resolved within 7 to 14 business days. Customers receive a prepaid shipping label if the product needs to be sent in for inspection or repair. Refurbished or renewed products come with a 90-day warranty. Warranty coverage is non-transferable and applies only to the original purchaser.

title: Exchange Policy
content: SwiftShip Logistics offers hassle-free exchanges for size, color, or style within 30 days of delivery. To initiate an exchange, customers should log into their account, navigate to order history, and select the exchange option for the eligible item. Exchanges are subject to availability of the desired item. If the replacement item is not in stock, the customer will be notified and offered the option to select an alternative or receive a full refund. For exchanges of the same item in a different size or color, there is no additional shipping charge. If exchanging for a different item of higher value, the customer will be charged the difference. If the replacement item is of lower value, the difference will be refunded to the original payment method. Customers receive a prepaid return label for the original item and the replacement is shipped once the return is scanned by the carrier. Express exchange is available for an additional $9.99, where the replacement item is shipped immediately before the original is returned. Original items must be in unused condition with all tags and packaging intact. Exchanges for international orders follow the same process but return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer. Only one exchange per item is permitted. If the exchanged item also needs to be exchanged, it must be processed as a return and new purchase.

title: Contact and Escalation Policy
content: SwiftShip Logistics provides multiple channels for customer support. Our phone support team is available Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 8 PM Eastern Time, and Saturday from 9 AM to 5 PM Eastern Time at 1-800-555-SHIP (7447). Live chat is available on our website and mobile app during the same hours for quick questions and order status inquiries. Email support is available 24 hours a day at support@swiftship.com with a response time of under 4 hours during business hours and within 12 hours on weekends and holidays. For urgent issues such as time-sensitive deliveries or safety concerns, customers should call our priority line at 1-800-555-RUSH (7874). If a customer is not satisfied with the initial resolution provided by a support representative, they may request to speak with a supervisor or team lead. Unresolved complaints can be escalated to our Customer Experience team by emailing escalations@swiftship.com or by requesting a formal escalation during any support interaction. Escalated cases are assigned a dedicated case manager and receive a response within 24 hours. For formal disputes or complaints, customers may submit a written complaint through our website's complaint form, which is reviewed by our compliance team within 5 business days. SwiftShip is committed to resolving all customer concerns fairly and efficiently, and we track all escalations to continuously improve our service quality.
